name: joyyy-landings
tagline: Interactive prototype engineer. Human + AI. Investor-ready demos in 48 hours.
description:
Interactive prototype engineer. Human + AI workflow. Investor-ready demos in 48 hours. Returns: single landing URL with live demos. No config, no API keys.

Rapid interactive prototypes for products, investors, and AI agents. Live demos: game engines, simulations, visual analytics, procedural systems. One link. Open and run. No backend required. Core demos: Crash Engine, Dice Room, MMO Map, Crash Probability Explorer.

Used by: founders preparing investor demos; AI teams building interactive explainers; product teams validating ideas fast. Available for: rapid prototype builds, interactive demos for investors, game math simulations, visual explainers. Typical delivery: 1–3 days per prototype. Positioning: systems thinker engineer / rapid prototype engineer.
